allow: Bash(rm -f src/app/page.tsx src/app/layout.tsx src/app/favicon.ico public/*.svg CLAUDE.md AGENTS.md; echo "cleaned"; ls public)

Bash(node -e "const l=require\('lucide-react'\); const keys=Object.keys\(l\); console.log\('github-ish:', keys.filter\(k=>/git|hub|linked|in$/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0,20\)\); console.log\('has Github?', 'Github' in l, '| Linkedin?', 'Linkedin' in l\);")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/contact -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Mario Rossi","email":"mario@test.it","message":"Vorrei un sito web nuovo per la mia azienda.","consent":true,"locale":"it"}' -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/contact -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Bot Name","email":"bot@spam.com","message":"spammy message here long enough","consent":true,"website":"http://spam.com"}' -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code} " -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/contact -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Test User","email":"t@t.it","message":"valid message content here","consent":true}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/contact -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Bot Name","email":"bot@spam.com","message":"spammy message here long enough","consent":true,"website":"http://spam.com"}' -w "  HTTP %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/contact -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Bot Name","email":"bot@spam.com","message":"spammy message here long enough","consent":true}' -w "  HTTP %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/contact -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Bot Name","email":"bot@spam.com","message":"spammy message here long enough","consent":true,"website":""}' -w "  HTTP %{http_code}\\n")
PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 1; "node procs after kill: " + \(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count)
